# Golf Swing Master - AI Golf Swing Analyzer
> 100% free AI golf swing analysis — upload a video and get pro-level coaching, no app install needed.

## About
Golf Swing Master is a free AI-powered golf swing analysis tool. Simply upload your swing video in the browser and receive detailed coaching feedback. No app download required.

## Features
- AI-powered swing analysis from video
- Driver slice correction tips
- Distance improvement coaching
- 100% browser-based — no app installation
- Completely free

## Links
- Analyze now: https://golf.archerlab.dev
- Developer: https://archerlab.dev

## Language
- Korean (한국어)

## Category
Golf, AI Sports Analysis, Swing Coaching, Free Golf Tool
